title: Brief Lüscher Test
subtitle: Alternative version
description: Pick the most and least pleasant color right now—not your favorite colors in general.
comment: Do not pick favorite colors. The test measures your current emotional state.

title: Full Lüscher Test
subtitle: Standard version
description: Order 8 colors from most to least pleasant—reflecting how you feel here and now.
comment: Do not pick favorite colors. The test measures your current emotional state.
